## Summary

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor/cleanup
- [ ] Docs/update

## Validation
- [ ] Ran app locally
- [ ] Verified no startup regressions
- [ ] Updated docs if needed

## Checklist
- [ ] No generated artifacts committed (`__pycache__`, logs, etc.)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where possible
- [ ] Added migration notes for config/firmware changes
